backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for Reeves Insurance Solutions backend, managing user profiles, quote submissions, business info, and admin access control with role-based permissions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (agent login modal, admin dashboard, admin nav layout) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, Schema.org InsuranceAgency structured data, and Google Fonts imports for the Reeves Insurance Solutions site.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router app defining the full route tree with a public index route and protected admin nested routes (dashboard, leads, policy management, lead assignment, analytics, PDF invoices) guarded by sessionStorage auth check.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying Johnathan Reeves' headshot, credentials list, and three value proposition cards with amber accents on a cream background.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminAnaly: Displays admin analytics with KPI cards (conversion rate, deal size, revenue, leads) and two Recharts visualizations: a bar chart for the lead conversion funnel and a line chart for monthly revenue trends.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminAppoi: Renders a table of all appointment submissions fetched via the useGetAllAppointments hook, showing name, phone, coverage type, best time to call, and submission date.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminDashb: Admin dashboard overview page displaying four stat cards (leads, quotes, calls, policies), a leads chart, a policy pie chart, and a compact recent-leads table.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Provides the admin portal shell with a responsive sidebar (desktop) and drawer (mobile) containing navigation links, a logo, and a logout button, rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLeadA: Allows admins to assign mock leads to one of four predefined agents via a dropdown, showing toast notifications on successful assignment.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLeads: Simple page wrapper that renders the LeadsTable component with a heading and subtitle for leads management.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLogin: Modal dialog for admin authentication with username/password fields, calls the useAdminAuth login hook, and redirects to the dashboard on success.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminPDFIn: Displays a list of mock insurance invoices with status badges and provides a print/PDF feature by generating and opening an HTML invoice document in a new browser window.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminPolic: Renders a table of mock client insurance policies with status badges and a 'New Policy' button for the admin policy management view.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSetti: Admin settings page that lists editable business info fields (name, phone, address, etc.), each backed by React Query hooks for fetching and updating values via inline edit controls.
frontend/src/components/admin/Appointmen: Renders a monthly calendar grid that maps QuoteSubmission appointments (by nanosecond timestamp) to their respective days, color-coded by coverage type, with month navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/admin/LeadsChart: Displays a Recharts line chart showing daily lead volume for the past 7 days with a custom tooltip, styled for the dark admin dashboard theme.
frontend/src/components/admin/LeadsTable: Renders a filterable, searchable table of mock leads with status and policy-type color coding, and supports CSV export of the filtered results.
frontend/src/components/admin/PolicyPieC: Displays a Recharts donut pie chart breaking down the policy mix by coverage type (Auto, Home, Life, Commercial) with a custom legend and tooltip.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProtectedA: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the home page by checking sessionStorage, otherwise renders child routes via Outlet.
A multi-step calendar booking component that lets users select a date, pick an available time slot, fill out a contact form, and receive a booking confirmation. Uses the `useCalendarBooking` hook for slot availability and appointment creation.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: A contact/quote request section displaying business contact info and a form where users submit their name, phone, email, zip code, coverage type, and preferred call time via the `useSubmitQuote` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/EmotionalCloseSe: A urgency-driven CTA section advertising limited availability (3 spots left) for a Conroe insurance website, highlighting key benefits and scrolling to the contact form on button click.
frontend/src/components/FloatingCallButt: A fixed floating button that links to the business phone number retrieved from `useBusinessInfo`, styled with a pulsing animation for mobile call conversion.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: A fixed floating WhatsApp button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat using the business's WhatsApp number from `useBusinessInfo`.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A site footer that renders the `ProcessProofSection` above a four-column layout with brand info, service links, company links, and contact details including social media icons.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A fixed responsive navigation header with scroll-aware background, desktop nav links, a phone CTA, a quote button, an agent login button, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section for a Conroe, TX insurance agency landing page featuring a background image, agent photo, headline, trust points, and CTA buttons to scroll to contact or call directly.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonC: Renders a grid of four insurance coverage type cards (Auto, Home, Life, Business) with icons, descriptions, and 'Get Quote' links for Houston-area customers.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonF: Footer component displaying business contact info, service areas, and coverage types for a Conroe insurance agent, along with a portfolio pitch section and a ProcessProofSection.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonH: Hero section for the Houston insurance landing page featuring a headline, agent photo, star ratings, and CTA buttons for getting a quote or calling the agent.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonQ: A quote request form that collects name, phone, email, zip code, coverage type, and preferred call time, then submits via the useHoustonQuoteSubmission hook and shows a confirmation on success.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonT: Displays three customer testimonials in cards with star ratings and a summary Google Reviews widget showing a 5.0 rating for the Conroe insurance agent.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonW: Section highlighting three reasons to choose the Houston independent insurance broker: personal local service, Houston area expertise, and 24/7 claims support.
frontend/src/components/MapSection.tsx: Displays a placeholder map section showing the business address using the useBusinessInfo hook, with a note to replace it with a real Google Maps embed.
frontend/src/components/ProcessProofSect: Three-step process section (Figma Design → Live Preview → Conroe #1) displayed as screenshot cards with step badges, illustrating the agency's website build workflow.
frontend/src/components/ReevesAboutSecti: About section for agent Johnathan Reeves featuring his photo, credentials, and an auto-advancing testimonial carousel with navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/ReevesCalendarSe: Scheduling section with a Calendly embed placeholder showing example embed code, plus a fallback direct-call CTA button.
frontend/src/components/ReevesCarrierBad: Displays a grid of four partnered insurance carrier badges (State Farm, Allstate, Geico, Progressive) with color-coded logo placeholders and A+ ratings, using an IntersectionObserver for fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/ReevesContactSec: A contact/quote request form section that collects name, phone, email, zip code, coverage type, and message, then submits via the useReevesQuoteSubmission hook, showing success or error states accordingly.
frontend/src/components/ReevesFooter.tsx: Site footer displaying the business brand, licensing disclaimer, social media links, contact details, quick navigation links, and a copyright notice using business info from the useBusinessInfo hook.
frontend/src/components/ReevesHeader.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the RIS logo, desktop nav links, a phone CTA, a 'Free Quote' button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu using business info from the useBusinessInfo hook.
frontend/src/components/ReevesHeroSectio: Full-screen hero section featuring a headline, subtext, 'Get Free Quote' and 'Schedule Call' CTAs, trust-signal stats, and a fade-in animation on mount, driven by useBusinessInfo data.
frontend/src/components/ReevesServicesSe: Services section that renders animated cards for five insurance types (auto, home, life, health, business) with icons, descriptions, and highlights, using IntersectionObserver for staggered reveal animations.
frontend/src/components/ReevesWhyChooseS: Displays a 'Why Choose Reeves Insurance Solutions' section with four animated cards (24/7 Support, Best Rates, Local Expert, A+ Carriers) that fade in on scroll using IntersectionObserver, styled with a dark navy/gold theme.
Renders a grid of six insurance service cards (auto, home, life, business, health, retirement) with icons, descriptions, benefits lists, and a scroll-to-contact CTA button.
frontend/src/components/StickyQuoteBar.t: A sticky top banner that appears after scrolling 300px, promoting a free insurance quote with a link to the contact form and a dismiss button.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: A carousel-style testimonials section displaying one client review at a time with star ratings, navigation arrows, and dot indicators against a dark background.
frontend/src/components/TrustBar.tsx: A horizontal stats bar showing four trust indicators (50+ carriers, 500+ families, 4.9 rating, 15+ years experience) with icons in a responsive two-to-four column grid.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: A section embedding a YouTube video about AI in insurance, with scroll-triggered fade-in animations, decorative corner accents, and a dynamic city name from the useBusinessInfo hook.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Displays four stat-driven reason cards (carrier count, claims support, families served, Google rating) in a dark gradient section highlighting the agency's differentiators.
frontend/src/data/mockLeads.ts: Defines TypeScript types and exports an array of 12 mock insurance leads with fields for id, name, phone, email, policy type, status, and date.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Provides simple admin authentication using sessionStorage with hardcoded credentials, exposing login, logout, and isAuthenticated state.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching quote submissions from the backend and reading/writing business info stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useBusinessInfo.ts: Aggregates all business info fields from individual useGetBusinessInfo queries, returning them with fallback default values.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalendarBooking.ts: Provides calendar booking utilities including static time slots, simulated booked slots, and functions to get available slots and book appointments.
frontend/src/hooks/useHoustonQuoteSubmis: Exposes a mutation hook for submitting a Houston-specific quote form to the backend actor and invalidating the quote submissions cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for user profile and quote submission CRUD operations against the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useReevesQuoteSubmiss: Exposes a mutation hook for submitting a Reeves-branded quote form, mapping string coverage types to backend enums before calling the actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a Forest Green and Amber Gold OKLCH design token system, Tailwind base/component/utility layers, custom fonts, and utility animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/HoustonDemoPage.tsx: Assembles the Houston demo landing page by composing Houston-specific section components in order.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Renders the Privacy Policy page for Reeves Insurance Solutions with a sticky header, back-to-home link, and multiple policy sections (introduction, data collection, usage, etc.).
frontend/src/pages/PublicSite.tsx: Assembles the original public-facing marketing site by composing all section components (Hero, About, Services, Testimonials, Contact, etc.) and includes an AdminLoginModal triggered by the header's agent login button.
frontend/src/pages/ReevesPublicSite.tsx: Assembles the Reeves Insurance Solutions branded public portfolio site using Reeves-prefixed section components, with floating action buttons (WhatsApp, Call) and a sticky quote bar.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with a custom brand palette (forest, amber, cream, charcoal), typography fonts (Playfair Display, DM Sans), custom shadows, and legacy Houston color aliases.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state including schema version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of existing implemented features for the Conroe TX insurance demo app with admin panel.
